'''Fordee''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] built by [[Mala Mala]] as a friend, protector, and personal transport. Fordee was armed with several blasters and would defend Mala to the death.

==Biography==
In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], shortly after the destruction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], He, Mala, and [[B6|Beesix]] (who was left behind in a spaceport) arrived on [[Centares/Legends|Centares]], where [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] interrogated and tortured the captured [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] pilot, [[Thurlow Harris]], in the former [[Museum of the Old Republic]], until he revealed that [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] had destroyed the Death Star.

When the name reached Vader's ears, he flew into a rage, and ordered his [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to kill everyone (including [[Brazzo]], [[Selle]], and [[Ban Papeega]]) who have heard of the name, and Mala tried to escape, but soon killed Thurlow afterward. They were then chased through the nearby woods until they cornered on a point of land. They had to jump for their lives, and although they went down firing, He was crushed upon impact. Mala barely survived, and was rescued by Beesix.

==Behind the scenes==
Fordee was created by ''Star Wars'' artist [[Dave Gibbons]] for [[Vader's Quest 1]] of the [[Star Wars: Vader's Quest|''Vader's Quest'']] series of comics, published in [[1999]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].
